summary: BLOCKS 509, 510, 511, 513 - All features verified. Admin override for @katieintheafterglow, Golden Hive payment webhook handler, and Honey Connect button styling all correctly implemented.

issues: Console warnings: nested <button> inside <button> and <a> inside <a> - hydration warnings (cosmetic, pre-existing)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 511: Admin override in server.py lines 171-181 runs on startup, correctly sets golden_hive=true, golden_hive_verified=true, golden_hive_status=APPROVED, is_admin=true for @katieintheafterglow

BLOCK 510: Webhook handler in honeypot.py lines 1171-1215 correctly unlocks Golden Hive on payment, sends admin email to katie@thehoneygroove.com (with email exemption for @katie), creates notification with type 'golden_hive_unlocked'

BLOCK 513: DiscogsImport.js lines 212-221 and DiscogsSecurityModal.js lines 84-92 both have correct Honey Gold styling (#FFBF00 background, #1A1A1A text, 1.5px #DAA520 border, font-bold, hover #E5AB00)
BLOCK 509: Golden Hive Verified badge in ProfilePage.js lines 469-483 renders correctly with shield SVG (goldShield gradient), golden-shimmer class, and metallic text gradient
seed_data_creation: None - used existing testuser1 with golden_hive_verified=true
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCKS 509, 510, 511, 513 all verified. @katieintheafterglow has golden_hive=true, golden_hive_verified=true, is_admin=true (verified via DB check and backend logs). testuser1 has golden_hive_verified=true showing the premium badge with shield SVG. Connect to Discogs button has Honey Gold #FFBF00 styling with proper hover state. Stripe webhook Golden Hive payment handler cannot be end-to-end tested but code review confirms correct implementation.
